description: This component when triggered by a button event will make the user press all the keys in the multikey at the same time.

fields.Keys: A list of keys that should be simulated being pressed when receiving a button event and they will be simulated by the source user of the button event.

notes.title: Behavior
notes.text: The keys do not press in order, and keys will not be pressed more than once if listed more than once.
